# lightdash_oauth_applications (Data Source)

Lists all OAuth applications registered for a Lightdash organization. Requires an organization admin personal access token.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization_uuid` (String) The UUID of the Lightdash organization.

### Read-Only

- `applications` (Attributes List) OAuth applications registered in the organization. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--applications))
- `id` (String) The data source identifier. It is computed as `organizations/<organization_uuid>/oauth_applications`.

<a id="nestedatt--applications"></a>
### Nested Schema for `applications`

Read-Only:

- `client_id` (String) The OAuth client ID.
- `client_name` (String) The display name of the OAuth application.
- `created_at` (String) ISO 8601 timestamp when the client was created.
- `created_by_user_uuid` (String) UUID of the user who created the client, if known.
- `redirect_uris` (List of String) Allowed OAuth redirect URIs.
- `scopes` (List of String) OAuth scopes stored on the client.
